title: [TL5 MACD] MACD Pro => RSI + ALMA Adaptive Momentum
author: AquaTickTrader
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: [TL5 MACD] MACD Pro => RSI + ALMA Adaptive Momentum by AquaTickTrader.

MACD Pro – RSI + ALMA Adaptive Momentum 🔎 Overview TL5 MACD Pro is a structurally enhanced version of the classic MACD indicator that integrates trend filtering, momentum confirmation, and adaptive bias analysis — while preserving the original MACD calculation.
The core MACD formula remains standard.
This version adds multi-layer confirmation using RSI, ALMA, and short-term structure alignment to help traders identify higher-quality momentum shifts.
🚀 What … Possible indicators: MACD, RSI, ALMA.
